## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO partnership between GrowthX and LlamaIndex, focusing on strategy, execution, and pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [LlamaIndex seeks to boost non-branded traffic by 50% over 6 months, particularly for Llama Cloud product](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by 12-month growth execution ($15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [GrowthX uses AI-assisted workflows with human expertise to create high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [LlamaIndex to consider pricing and timeline, with potential start two weeks from meeting date](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

## Topics

### LlamaIndex's SEO Goals and Context

  - [Aiming to increase non-branded traffic, currently 10-20% of total](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Focus on Llama Cloud product for document parsing and OCR](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Target: 50% increase in non-branded traffic over 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Long-term goal to track content-driven signups and MQLs](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Differentiators

  - [Two-phase process: 8-week strategy sprint, 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Team structure: Managing Director, Managing Editor, Content Manager](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Use of AI-assisted workflows with human expertise for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Custom-built platform for efficient content generation and management](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Capability to handle image creation and CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Strategy sprint to develop audience personas, company context, voice guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Content creation typically starts around week 5 of strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Use of AI-powered workflows for research, fact-checking, and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Human experts involved in review and quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

### Pricing and Timeline

  - [Strategy sprint: $20K fixed fee for 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Growth execution: $15K per month](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [GrowthX currently booked until early October](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [LlamaIndex interested in starting two weeks from meeting date](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [GrowthX offers built-in analytics and LLM visibility tools](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Potential for custom dashboard setup to track content quality and attribution](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

## Next Steps

  - [LlamaIndex to consider pricing and timeline proposed by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Murtaza to connect with Marcel (GrowthX) for further discussion on pricing and availability](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [GrowthX to confirm capability for setting up custom reporting dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore potential for earlier start date to accommodate LlamaIndex's timeline](https://fathom.video/share/BsrcXvU8fYiQSGF4BFaCy1hsf_GY2UXt?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
